artPrompt: A lean human acolyte in ashen ceremonial robes raises a single skeletal hand wreathed in faint deathly cold gold light, eyes burning with lifelong zealous purpose amid a candlelit congregation. The looming clock tower bleeds against a blood-dark sky behind, smoke and ash drifting past. Heroic full-figure film-still framing with epic apocalyptic depth, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Reckoning Day Acolyte
text:
Deathtouch
When Reckoning Day Acolyte dies, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. One down, several billion to go.
flavorText: Trained their whole life for the reckoning. Got blocked by a 2/2 on turn three.
